title: Ater's Roleplay and Exploration
description: Want magic? Want tech? How about some exploration and loot? or just some creative fun? This pack has it all. This is packed with my favorite mods for you to enjoy!
body:
Want magic? Want tech? How about some exploration and loot? or just some creative fun? This pack has it all. This is packed with my favorite mods, such as:

Magic: Iron's spells and spellbooks, and Reliquary.

Tech: Create, Industrial forgoing and Mekanism.

Not to mention my favorite mod of all time, Project E! Turn any item into points which can then be turned into other learned items! (One diamond into thousands of dirt! lessens the grind!)

So many structures to loot and turn into a base, or build a base yourself with furniture mods! Or like just playing in creative and roleplaying? Create NPCs with Custom NPC, make quick builds with World Edit or perfect and decorate with Littletiles, create and edit items with IBE editor! Play how you want!
